'''''Vanguard''''' was an Imperial [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]. The ship protected a convoy passing the [[Eidoloni system/Legends|Eidoloni system]], which carried material for the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
